description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in copper from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the leather effect fabric and jewel embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 24cmWidth: 50cmDepth: 12cmMade of synthetic leather for durability with bold amber coloured embellishments on frontHas one large main zipped compartment with one internal zipped pocket and organiser pocketsTwo handlesTwo zip pockets on front with chain decoration and one zip pocket on backSides gathered with strapsCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
